2605.21395.title: Towards Resilient and Autonomous Networks: A BlueSky Vision on AI-Native 6G
2605.21395.paper_summary: The proliferation of emerging applications, such as autonomous driving and immersive experiences, demands cellular networks that are not only faster, but fundamentally more resilient and autonomous. This paper presents a BlueSky vision on how Artificial Intelligence will be natively integrated into 6G, shifting the paradigm from \underline{Network for AI} to \underline{AI for Network}. We envision that, unlike 5G's reliance on scattered, ad-hoc models each trained for a single task, native AI in the 6G era will be anchored by a foundation model and and orchestrated via collaborative multi-agent systems, framing network management as a unified, multi-modal, multi-task optimization problem. Built on this vision, we outline two transformative directions. The first focuses on developing a 6G foundation model as a unified backbone, with task-specific knowledge distilled into compact models suited for diverse edge deployments. The second advances multi-agent systems designed to autonomously diagnose, maintain, and recover networks with minimal human intervention. These directions chart a roadmap for 6G to evolve into an intelligent, self-sustaining communication infrastructure.
2605.21395.paper_summary_zh: 新興應用的快速增長，例如自動駕駛和沉浸式體驗，要求行動網路不僅要更快，還要在根本上更具韌性和自主性。本文提出了一個關於人工智慧如何原生整合進入6G的藍天願景，將範式從\underline{為人工智慧而設的網路}轉變為\underline{為網路而設的人工智慧}。我們預見到，與5G依賴於分散的、臨時的模型，每個模型僅針對單一任務不同，6G時代的原生人工智慧將以基礎模型為基礎，並通過協作多代理系統進行協調，將網路管理框架視為一個統一的、多模態的、多任務的優化問題。在這一願景的基礎上，我們概述了兩個變革方向。第一個方向專注於開發6G基礎模型作為統一的骨幹，將特定任務的知識提煉成適合多樣邊緣部署的緊湊模型。第二個方向推進設計多代理系統，旨在自主診斷、維護和恢復網路，並將人類干預降至最低。這些方向為6G演變為一個智能、自我維持的通信基礎設施勾畫了藍圖。
2605.21395.author: Liang Wu et.al.
2605.21395.authors: Liang Wu, Kelly Wan, Mayank Darbari, Liangjie Hong
